query: Terrion Arnold Detroit Lions Commissioner's Exempt List released waived NFL transaction status July 2026
answer:
## Answer

**The premise is incorrect: Terrion Arnold was never placed on the Commissioner's Exempt List.** Here's what actually happened:

- **June 29, 2026**: The Detroit Lions **waived/released** Arnold outright (not exempt-listed him) — less than a week after his arrest on **eight felonies** (four counts each of armed robbery and kidnapping) from a February 2026 Florida incident.
- **July 6–7, 2026 (Monday)**: Arnold **cleared waivers unclaimed** and became an **unrestricted free agent**. No team claimed his contract.
- **Current status (~July 12, 2026)**: Unsigned free agent under court-ordered house arrest in Tallahassee, FL, awaiting trial, while reportedly drawing interest from ~4 teams (Texans, Colts, Jets, Seahawks). On ~July 10–11, a judge denied the state's request for a GPS ankle monitor.

The Commissioner's Exempt List was only raised **hypothetically** in fan/media commentary — because the Lions released him outright rather than keeping him under contract, exempt-list placement was moot.

sources.title: Lions Waive CB Terrion Arnold
sources.snippet: The Lions have waived cornerback Terrion Arnold per a team announcement. The former first-round pick was recently charged with eight felonies in Florida.

sources.title: Arnold clears waivers, becomes free agent amid court case
sources.snippet: Arnold cleared waivers Monday and has become a free agent; no team claimed him. He remains under court-ordered house arrest in Tallahassee, Florida.

sources.title: Terrion Arnold, former Lions CB, a free agent after clearing waivers
sources.snippet: Arnold, 23, cleared waivers Monday, making him a free agent eligible to sign elsewhere. He was released by the Lions on June 29 after his arrest.

sources.title: Former Lions CB Terrion Arnold draws interest from 4 NFL teams
sources.snippet: The Lions released Terrion Arnold following his February arrest. He cleared waivers and is drawing interest from multiple NFL teams (Texans, Colts, Jets, Seahawks).

sources.title: Former Detroit Lions CB Terrion Arnold Scores Legal Victory Ahead of Trial
sources.snippet: A Florida judge denied the state's request to place him on a GPS ankle monitor while he awaits trial on felony kidnapping and robbery charges.

sources.title: Terrion Arnold clears waivers
sources.snippet: No team was sufficiently interested to claim the balance of his contract on waivers; Arnold passed through waivers unclaimed.

sources.title: Former Lions CB Terrion Arnold clears waivers, 3 teams interested
sources.snippet: Former Detroit Lions cornerback Terrion Arnold cleared waivers Monday as expected. The 2024 first-round pick faces eight felony charges from a February incident.
